element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Chronos and Sarah unlock vertical traversal options
New defensive mechanic relative to previous Golden Axe titles
Mischievous gnomes carry potions; all magic is consumed upon cast (non-selective)
Four types with different attack patterns; fire dragon, snails, green dragon
Barrels, crystal cells, guarded prisoners; grants extra lives
Players choose which path to take toward Golden Axe
Human slingshot teamwork mechanic in co-op mode
Eve (transformed king) and Damud Hellstrike (final boss with two forms)
Unlocked only with high score on final boss defeat

typical_tension_triggers: Magic depletion before next gnome encounter
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Standard beat 'em up cycle: wave engagement → relief via resource pickup → boss spike → branching path choice resets pressure

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Prisoner locations (barrels, crystal cells) signal exploration value and extra life economy

difficulty_curve.early_game: Standard enemy waves with basic melee combat focus; character-specific movement abilities tutorial
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of blocking, defensive moves, projectile attacks; Bizarrian mounts; magic system management; path branching increases replayability pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters intensify; Eve (transformed king) mid-game boss; Damud Hellstrike final form gated by score threshold
notable_spikes: Damud Hellstrike final boss (conditional second form with high score requirement)

notable_level_patterns.description: Standard beat 'em up progression: enemy waves punctuated by gnome magic potions and Bizarrian mounts; prisoner liberation breaks up combat with exploration sub-goals
Mid-campaign decision points where player selects route; creates branching narrative and replayability without level redesign
Concentrated single-opponent or small group combat with boss-specific patterns; Eve and Damud Hellstrike represent escalating difficulty
